description: 梦境系统 — 日记子标签、Wiki 预览、导入洞察、记忆宫殿 UI

replacements.: activeDiarySubTab === \"insights\"\n:
: activeDiarySubTab === "insights"
                  ? props.wikiImportInsightsLoading
                    ? "重新加载中…"
                    : "重新加载"
                  : props.wikiMemoryPalaceLoading
                    ? "重新加载中…"
                    : "重新加载"
replacements.the system writes while replaying and co: the system writes while replaying and consolidating memory（系统在回放和整合记忆时撰写）
replacements.imported insights clustered from externa: imported insights clustered from external history（从外部历史中聚类的导入洞察）
replacements.the compiled memory wiki surface the sys: the compiled memory wiki surface the system can search（系统可搜索和推理的编译记忆 wiki）
replacements.`No wiki page found for ${lookup}.`: `未找到 ${lookup} 对应的 Wiki 页面。`
replacements.Showing the first chunk of this: 显示此页面的第一部分
replacements.Imported Insights and Memory Palace are: 导入洞察和记忆宫殿由内置
replacements.Enable <code>plugins.entries.memory-wiki: 启用 plugins.entries.memory-wiki.enabled = true，然后重新加载此
replacements.the wiki mostly has raw source imports a: the wiki mostly has raw source imports and operational reports（wiki 主要包含原始来源导入和运行报告）
